string.text: %c[ui_gray_1]Fair Fast Travel is replaced by %c[pda_yellow]Dorn's Fast Travel%c[ui_gray_1].\n \n%c[pda_white]See %c[pda_yellow]PDA Guide > Addons > Dorn's Fast Travel%c[pda_white] for how travel works.

%c[ui_gray_1] 
%c[pda_yellow]Dorn's Fast Travel%c[ui_gray_1] lets you move around the Zone from the PDA map instead of walking every metre yourself.


%c[pda_green]HOW TO TRAVEL
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Open the PDA map and %c[pda_yellow]right-click%c[ui_gray_2] a destination - bases, campfires, zone exits, your own stashes, and similar markers.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Travel here%c[ui_gray_2]: normal speed. Free. About one game hour per kilometre at normal weight on the same map.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Sneak here%c[ui_gray_2]: about %c[pda_yellow]3x slower%c[ui_gray_2] than normal travel, but much better odds of avoiding ambushes.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Hire guide%c[ui_gray_2]: pay rubles for an instant jump (usually to a base on another map). Fee depends on difficulty and distance.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Your own backpack stashes (and anomalous stashes if installed): %c[pda_yellow]Hire guide%c[ui_gray_2] only.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Animated walk travel works %c[pda_yellow]only within your current map%c[ui_gray_2]. Use a zone exit or hire a guide to leave the area.


%c[pda_green]WHILE YOU TRAVEL
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Dots show your route on the map. The game clock is frozen until you arrive or are interrupted.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Right-click the map and choose %c[pda_yellow]Cancel journey%c[ui_gray_2] (or Back/Esc) to stop - you stay where you started and lose no time.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]When you arrive, hunger, thirst, and tiredness catch up for the trip time. Longer trips (sneaking, heavy loads) cost more.


%c[pda_green]ENCUMBRANCE (INVENTORY WEIGHT)
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Uses the same weight colours as your inventory screen - not the HUD encumbrance icon.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]White weight%c[ui_gray_2]: normal map travel speed.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Yellow weight%c[ui_gray_2] (within 10 kg of max carry): %c[pda_yellow]-20%%%c[ui_gray_2] map speed; trips take about 25%% longer.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Red weight%c[ui_gray_2] (over max carry): %c[pda_yellow]-50%%%c[ui_gray_2] map speed; trips take twice as long.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Too encumbered to move%c[ui_gray_2] (cannot walk in the world): you cannot start walk or sneak travel. %c[pda_yellow]Hire guide%c[ui_gray_2] still works - guides carry your gear.


%c[pda_green]SNEAKING SKILL
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Gained by sneaking past threats and finishing sneak journeys. Open the skills menu (%c[pda_yellow]K%c[ui_gray_2] by default) for exact stats.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Each level adds (approx.):
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+3%%%c[ui_gray_2] ambush dodge chance
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+2%%%c[ui_gray_2] PDA map travel speed
 %c[pda_white] - %c[pda_yellow]+1 m%c[ui_gray_2] extra distance when ambushes drop you short of your goal
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Everyone starts with about %c[pda_yellow]20%%%c[ui_gray_2] base dodge before Sneaking bonuses.


%c[pda_green]AMBUSHES
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]You cannot start travel with enemies within about %c[pda_yellow]50 m%c[ui_gray_2].
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Along the route, patrols may spot you. Your %c[pda_yellow]dodge chance%%%c[ui_gray_2] (Sneaking skill + sneak mode only) is shown when you pick Travel or Sneak. If you fail, you are dropped short and must fight.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Sneak here%c[ui_gray_2] doubles your dodge chance (up to %c[pda_yellow]95%%%c[ui_gray_2] cap).
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Hire guide%c[ui_gray_2] trips cannot be ambushed.


%c[pda_green]VISIBILITY (TIME AND WEATHER)
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]How far patrols can spot you along the route (ambush scan radius). Does not change dodge chance.
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]Day%c[ui_gray_2] (7 AM - 7 PM): %c[pda_yellow]50 m%c[ui_gray_2]. %c[pda_yellow]Dawn/dusk%c[ui_gray_2] (6-7 AM, 7-8 PM): %c[pda_yellow]40 m%c[ui_gray_2]. %c[pda_yellow]Night%c[ui_gray_2] (8 PM - 6 AM): %c[pda_yellow]30 m%c[ui_gray_2].
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Weather tightens visibility (best only, subtracted from time-of-day base): %c[pda_yellow]rain -10 m%c[ui_gray_2], %c[pda_yellow]storm -15 m%c[ui_gray_2], %c[pda_yellow]fog -20 m%c[ui_gray_2]. Minimum %c[pda_yellow]10 m%c[ui_gray_2].
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Examples: night rain %c[pda_yellow]20 m%c[ui_gray_2]; night fog %c[pda_yellow]10 m%c[ui_gray_2]; day fog %c[pda_yellow]30 m%c[ui_gray_2].


%c[pda_green]GUIDE FEES
 %c[pda_white]- %c[ui_gray_2]Per kilometre: Easy %c[pda_yellow]2000 RU%c[ui_gray_2], Medium %c[pda_yellow]2500 RU%c[ui_gray_2], Hard %c[pda_yellow]3000 RU%c[ui_gray_2]. Ignores weight limits and ambushes.


%c[pda_green]SETTINGS
 %c[pda_white]- %c[pda_yellow]MCM > Dorn's Fast Travel%c[ui_gray_2]: top travel speed when lightly loaded, and how long PDA messages stay on screen.


%c[pda_white]Good hunting, stalker!
